response:
J'ai reçu sept propositions de résolution conformément à l'article 37 du Règlement intérieur.

This translation preserves the formal, procedural tone of the original parliamentary text, using standard terminology used in French-language parliamentary and EU institutional contexts: "propositions de résolution" is the official equivalent of "motions for resolutions" in this procedural setting, "conformément à" correctly renders "pursuant to", and "Règlement intérieur" is the standard formal translation for "Rules of Procedure", with procedural rules numbered as "articles" in French parliamentary usage.
